ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_code" TEXT /* Code of the home team (e.g., IND for Indiana) */,
  "away_team_code" TEXT /* Code of the away team (e.g., ORL for Orlando) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators in attendance */,
  "referees" TEXT /* A list of referees for the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code of the team (e.g., IND for Indiana) */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the current coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* The player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* The number of years of professional experience */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_number" TEXT /* The pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_zones" (
  "shot_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot zone */,
  "shot_zone_basic" TEXT /* Basic shot zone (e.g., Above the Break 3) */,
  "shot_zone_area" TEXT /* Area of the shot zone (e.g., Center(C), Right Side Center(RC)) */,
  "shot_zone_range" TEXT /* Range of the shot zone (e.g., 24+ ft.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the shot zone */,
  "area_coordinates" TEXT /* The coordinates defining the area of the shot zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* A hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
